---
title: "individuel_ditistsamtale_3"
subtitle: "`individuel_ditistsamtale_3`"
description: "individuel_ditistsamtale_3"
---

<!--
NEVER EDIT MANUALLY. This documentation was auto-generated by `seedcase-flower`.
If you want to edit the content, please make changes to the `datapackage.json` file.
-->

- Path: `resources/individuel_ditistsamtale_3/data.parquet`
- Primary key: (`event`)

| Name                            | Title                         | Type   | Description                                                                                                                                                                              |
|---------------------------------|-------------------------------|--------|------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| `event`                         | The unique name of the event  | string | The unique name identifying the event when the form was filled in.                                                                                                                       |
| `center`                        | Research center               | string | The research center where the data item was recorded.                                                                                                                                    |
| `date_diet_consult_3`           | date_diet_consult_3           | date   | Date of individual dietitian consultation. Consulation 3.                                                                                                                                |
| `type_diet_consult_3`           | type_diet_consult_3           | string | Indicates the type of contact with the participant. Consultation 3.                                                                                                                      |
| `staff_initials_diet_consult_3` | staff_initials_diet_consult_3 | string | Initials of the study staff member responsible for conducting the consultation. Consultation 3.                                                                                          |
| `weight_diet_consult_3`         | weight_diet_consult_3         | number | Participant's weight in kilograms, measured with light clothing using the BMI scale in 1.15 or from scale at home (telephone and video). Measured to the nearest 0.1 kg. Consultation 3. |
| `status_diet_consult_3`         | status_diet_consult_3         | string | Status on how the participant is doing with the diet intervention. Individual consultation 3.                                                                                            |
| `summary_diet_consult_3`        | summary_diet_consult_3        | string | Summary of the consultation. Consultation 3.                                                                                                                                             |

: Fields in the `individuel_ditistsamtale_3` resource.
